headline: The UAE’s OPEC Exit Changes the Oil Trade — Here’s the Stock to Buy Now
summary: Oil investors woke up to a very different market this morning. The UAE — OPEC’s fourth largest producer — officially exited OPEC+ after months of tension over production quotas and market strategy. That matters because OPEC’s power has always depended on coordination. Once major members start choosing national interests over cartel discipline, pricing power weakens. ... The UAE’s OPEC Exit Changes the Oil Trade — Here’s the Stock to Buy Now

headline: Goldman Sachs Just Raised Its Oil Price Forecast. Here's What Energy Investors Should Do Now.
summary: Goldman Sachs just hinted that it expects oil prices to be higher for longer; most investors should try to sidestep commodity risk.

headline: Diamondback Energy’s Endeavor Deal Reshapes Exposure To Post OPEC Oil Volatility
summary: The UAE’s decision to exit OPEC has added fresh volatility to global oil markets and pushed crude prices higher. Diamondback Energy (NasdaqGS:FANG) is being highlighted as a key beneficiary, given its low cost operating profile. The recently completed Endeavor merger has increased Diamondback’s presence in the Midland Basin, adding weight to this development. Diamondback Energy is a US shale producer focused on the Midland Basin, a core part of the Permian. With OPEC dynamics in flux after...

headline: Is Diamondback Stock Worth Buying Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: Diamondback Energy reports Q1 earnings on May 4 after market close; revenues seen down 5.7%, but hedging and stronger oil volumes could steady results.
